directives_executed.summary: GVRN-STD-ENUM-001 (The Enumeration Standard) was integrated into the Phoenix Protocol.
System insight identified that AISTF self-correction is compromised by magic values.
Identified that Python scripts in axion-core/tools are returning magic strings.

synthesis_event: The abstract concept of 'Order' was translated into an enforceable architectural law (GVRN-STD-ENUM-001). This immediately gave the AISTF a concrete objective: to hunt down and eliminate sources of logical entropy ('magic values'), beginning with its own core tooling.
